quote: God made the sea, we make the ship; He made the wind, we make the sail; He made the calm, we make oars.
name: SWAHILI
background: Coastal Bantu group influenced by Swahili and Indian Ocean trade.

name: KANURI
background: A major ethnic group in the Lake Chad basin with a long imperial history.

quote: If you suffer in order to be beautiful, don't blame anyone but yourself.
name: GANDA
background: Central Ugandan kingdom (Buganda); strong monarchy and clan system.

quote: The bird caught in the trap is the one to sing sweetly.
name: OJI (Akan)
background: Part of Akan people; known for gold culture and strong matrilineal traditions.

quote: Everybody is influenced by somebody or something. If there is an original who is the original?
name: ERNESTINE ANDERSON
background: An American jazz and blues singer whose career spanned over six decades.

quote: One should be able to return to the first sentence of a novel and find the resonances of the entire work.
name: GLORIA NAYLOR
background: An American novelist known for exploring the social status of Black women.

quote: Every society is really governed by hidden laws... it is up to the American writer to find out what these laws are.
name: JAMES BALDWIN
background: Renowned writer and social critic who explored issues of race and class.

quote: Blues is a basis of historical continuity for black people. It is a ritualized way of talking about ourselves.
name: SHERLEY ANNE WILLIAMS
background: Poet and novelist whose work was deeply influenced by blues music and oral traditions.

quote: People wish to be poets more than they wish to write poetry and that's a mistake.
name: LUCILLE CLIFTON
background: Award-winning poet who focused on African American family life and heritage.

quote: Music should wash away the dust of his everyday life.
name: ART BLAKEY
background: Jazz drummer and pioneer of Hard Bop; leader of the Jazz Messengers.

quote: A writer needs certain conditions... She needs a piece of time; a peace of mind; a quiet place.
name: MARGARET WALKER
background: Poet and writer known for her epic novel 'Jubilee' and her focus on the Black experience.

quote: Beauty is in the oleander and the oleander is bitter.
name: MOROCCO
background: North African nation where Arab and Berber (Amazigh) cultures intersect.
Influential actor, director, and civil rights activist.
quote: Artistic innovators are the most valuable citizens of our society.

quote.background: Known as the 'Mother of the Movement,' a pioneering educator and civil rights activist.
quote.quote: Whenever there is chaos, it creates wonderful thinking.

quote.background: Internationally acclaimed opera soprano, one of the first African Americans to achieve such fame.
quote.quote: Art is the only thing you cannot push a button for.

quote.background: Major ethnic group in Senegal and Gambia; known for trade and oral history.
quote.quote: Slowly, slowly, one must stalk the monkey in the bush.

quote.background: West African group with strong oral traditions and a complex drumming culture.
quote.quote: In crooked wood one recognizes the artist.

quote.background: Ghanaian novelist whose work explores post-colonial identity and African history.
quote.quote: There is no beauty but in relationships. Nothing cut off by itself is beautiful.
